'''Atapap I''' was part of the [[Atapap system/Legends|Atapap system]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> At the dawn of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], centuries before the rise of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], it was, along with [[Fadden]] and [[Aquilae (Aquilae system)|Aquilae]], settled by [[Colonist/Legends|colonists]] of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Species/Legends|species]],<ref name="GC" /> which was native to the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet [[Duro/Legends|Duro]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Atapap I was first mentioned in "[[The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Duros]]," an article authored by [[Bart Armstrong]] and [[Steve Miller]] with [[Cory Herndon]] and published in [[Star Wars Gamer 2|''Star Wars Gamer'' 2]]<ref name="GC" /> in [[February]] [[2001]].<ref name="Gamer2 date">{{SWArchive|url=gaming/other/rpg/news20010118.html|text=''Star Wars Gamer'' #2}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Atapap [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the world itself, in grid square N-12.<ref name="TEA" />
